source.title: New NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super Delivers 5x Higher Throughput for Agentic AI

en.title: NVIDIA's New Model Runs AI Agents 5x Faster
en.description: Nemotron 3 Super is a 120B parameter open model with only 12B active — built for agentic AI at scale with 5x throughput improvement.

slides.headline: 120 Billion Parameters
slides.body_text: But only 12 billion are active at once.
slides.narration: NVIDIA just dropped a model with 120 billion parameters — but here's the twist. Only 12 billion are active at any given time. It's called Nemotron 3 Super, and it delivers 5x higher throughput for AI agents.
slides.image_prompt: Massive neural network visualization with 120 billion glowing nodes, but only a small cluster of 12 billion lit up in bright green, the rest dim, NVIDIA green color scheme, 16:9

slides.headline: Mixture of Experts
slides.narration: The trick is called Mixture of Experts, or MoE. Instead of running all 120 billion parameters on every request, the model routes each task to a small group of specialized experts. You get the intelligence of a massive model at the cost of a small one.
slides.image_prompt: Diagram showing a central router directing queries to different specialized expert modules, each glowing with different colors, technical but clean illustration, dark background, 16:9

slides.headline: Built for Agents
slides.narration: Nemotron 3 Super isn't built for casual chat. It's designed for complex agentic AI systems — agents that plan multi-step tasks, use tools, call APIs, and make decisions. The kind of AI that actually does work, not just talks about it.
slides.image_prompt: AI agent orchestrating multiple tools simultaneously: a code editor, a database, an API connector, and a file system, all connected by flowing data streams, NVIDIA green accents, 16:9

slides.headline: 5x Throughput
slides.body_text: Same hardware, five times more work
slides.narration: Five times higher throughput means you can run five times more agent requests on the same GPU. For companies deploying AI agents at scale, this isn't a nice-to-have — it's the difference between a prototype and a production system.
slides.image_prompt: Bar chart comparison showing 1x on the left and 5x on the right with GPU icons, dramatic scale difference, clean data visualization style, NVIDIA green on dark background, 16:9

slides.headline: Open Model
slides.body_text: Download it. Run it. Modify it.
slides.narration: And here's the best part — it's open. You can download the weights, run it on your own infrastructure, fine-tune it for your specific use case. No API lock-in. No vendor dependency. NVIDIA is betting that open models win the agent race.
slides.image_prompt: Open padlock surrounded by download arrows and code brackets, open source celebration concept, NVIDIA green glow on dark background, 16:9

slides.headline: The Agent Hardware Race
slides.body_text: Models are only half the equation
slides.narration: NVIDIA isn't just selling GPUs anymore. They're building the full stack for agentic AI — models, inference engines, and deployment infrastructure. The message is clear: the future of AI isn't just about smarter models. It's about running them efficiently at scale.
slides.image_prompt: NVIDIA data center with rows of glowing GPU racks, holographic AI agent avatars floating above each rack, futuristic industrial scale, green accent lighting, 16:9

slides.headline: Why It Matters
slides.body_text: Cheaper agents = more agents = bigger impact
slides.narration: When you make AI agents 5 times cheaper to run, you don't just save money. You unlock use cases that weren't economically viable before. Every small business, every developer, every startup gets access to agent-level AI. That's the real game changer.
slides.image_prompt: Expanding circles of diverse small businesses and developers each with their own AI agent assistant, democratic access to AI concept, warm optimistic lighting, 16:9

zh.title: NVIDIA 新模型讓 AI Agent 快 5 倍
zh.description: Nemotron 3 Super 是 1200 億參數的開源模型，但只有 120 億參數同時運作 — 為大規模 Agent AI 打造，吞吐量提升 5 倍。

slides.headline: 1200 億參數
slides.body_text: 但同時只有 120 億在運作
slides.narration: NVIDIA 剛發布了一個 1200 億參數的模型。但重點來了，任何時候只有 120 億參數是活躍的。它叫 Nemotron 3 Super，為 AI Agent 帶來 5 倍的吞吐量提升。
slides.image_prompt: Massive neural network visualization with 120 billion glowing nodes, but only a small cluster of 12 billion lit up in bright green, the rest dim, NVIDIA green color scheme, 16:9

slides.headline: 混合專家架構
slides.narration: 這個技術叫混合專家架構，簡稱 MoE。不是每個請求都跑全部 1200 億參數，而是把每個任務路由到一小群專門的專家模組。你得到大模型的智慧，但只付小模型的成本。
slides.image_prompt: Diagram showing a central router directing queries to different specialized expert modules, each glowing with different colors, technical but clean illustration, dark background, 16:9

slides.headline: 專為 Agent 打造
slides.body_text: 不是聊天機器人，是自主系統
slides.narration: Nemotron 3 Super 不是設計來閒聊的。它是為複雜的 Agent AI 系統打造的。會規劃多步驟任務、使用工具、呼叫 API、做決策。是真的在幹活的 AI，不是只會說話的。
slides.image_prompt: AI agent orchestrating multiple tools simultaneously: a code editor, a database, an API connector, and a file system, all connected by flowing data streams, NVIDIA green accents, 16:9

slides.headline: 5 倍吞吐量
slides.body_text: 同樣的硬體，五倍的工作量
slides.narration: 5 倍吞吐量意味著同一張 GPU 可以處理 5 倍的 Agent 請求。對大規模部署 AI Agent 的企業來說，這不是錦上添花，這是原型和正式產品之間的差距。
slides.image_prompt: Bar chart comparison showing 1x on the left and 5x on the right with GPU icons, dramatic scale difference, clean data visualization style, NVIDIA green on dark background, 16:9

slides.headline: 開源模型
slides.narration: 最棒的是，它是開源的。你可以下載權重、在自己的基礎設施上跑、針對你的場景微調。沒有 API 綁定，沒有供應商依賴。NVIDIA 押注開源模型會贏得 Agent 競賽。
slides.image_prompt: Open padlock surrounded by download arrows and code brackets, open source celebration concept, NVIDIA green glow on dark background, 16:9

slides.headline: Agent 硬體軍備競賽
slides.narration: NVIDIA 不只是賣 GPU 了。他們在建構 Agent AI 的完整技術棧，模型、推理引擎、部署基礎設施。訊息很明確：AI 的未來不只是更聰明的模型，是要能大規模高效運行。
slides.image_prompt: NVIDIA data center with rows of glowing GPU racks, holographic AI agent avatars floating above each rack, futuristic industrial scale, green accent lighting, 16:9

slides.headline: 為什麼重要
slides.body_text: 更便宜的 Agent = 更多 Agent = 更大影響
slides.narration: 當 AI Agent 的運行成本降低 5 倍，你不只是省錢。你解鎖了以前不划算的應用場景。每個小企業、每個開發者、每個新創公司都能用上 Agent 級別的 AI。這才是真正的遊戲規則改變者。
slides.image_prompt: Expanding circles of diverse small businesses and developers each with their own AI agent assistant, democratic access to AI concept, warm optimistic lighting, 16:9
